# Now Trending — Real-Time Trend Discovery

> Search any topic and instantly discover related trending searches from Google Trends. See what the world is searching for right now.

## About

Now Trending is a free trend discovery tool that lets you search any topic and instantly see related trending searches, rising queries, and search interest over time. Powered by Google Trends data, it provides a simple interface for exploring what people are searching for — useful for content creators, marketers, researchers, and the curious.

## Features

- **Topic Search**: Enter any keyword to see related trending searches
- **Rising Queries**: Discover breakout searches with explosive growth
- **Real-Time Data**: Powered by live Google Trends data
- **Clean Interface**: No clutter, no ads — just trends

## Use Cases

- Content creators finding trending topics to cover
- Marketers researching keyword trends and seasonal interest
- Journalists tracking emerging stories
- SEO professionals identifying rising search queries
- Researchers analyzing public interest patterns

## Links

- Website: https://now-trend.ing
